# Nadeem Aslam — Senior Mobile Developer

> Portfolio and blog of Nadeem Aslam, a Senior Mobile Developer with 6+ years
> of experience building Android and iOS applications. His apps have accumulated
> 5M+ downloads across the Google Play Store and Apple App Store.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://nadeemaslam.dev): Overview, highlights, featured projects, testimonials, FAQ, and contact form.
- [Portfolio](https://nadeemaslam.dev/work): Full list of 10 shipped mobile apps with case studies, screenshots, and store links.
- [Blog](https://nadeemaslam.dev/blog): In-depth technical articles on Android development, Kotlin, and mobile architecture.

## Technical Articles

- [Kotlin Coroutines: Dispatchers, Scopes & Fundamentals](https://nadeemaslam.dev/blog/kotlin-coroutines-guide)
- [Coroutine Jobs, SupervisorJob & Cancellation in Kotlin](https://nadeemaslam.dev/blog/kotlin-coroutine-jobs-cancellation)
- [Kotlin Flow Operators: The Complete Guide](https://nadeemaslam.dev/blog/kotlin-flow-operators-guide)

## Notable Apps

- Virtual 5G: 8.9M downloads, 4.4 stars, 23K+ ratings (Android)
- VPN Express: 1.7M downloads, 4.5 stars (Android & iOS)
- Smart IPTV Xtream Player: 50K+ downloads (Android)
- Orion AI Chatbot Assistant: 4.5 stars (iOS)
- NetOptimizer: 4.5 stars, 19 languages (iOS)

## Services

Native Android development (Kotlin, Java), native iOS development (Swift, SwiftUI),
cross-platform development (Flutter, React Native), VPN and networking apps,
AI and chatbot apps, streaming and IPTV apps.
